description_long: This is a compact, vertical filing cabinet constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring three distinct drawers on its front face. Each drawer is fitted with a dark wood or metal front panel and a prominent orange handle, adding a pop of color and visual contrast. The handles are rectangular and appear to be of the bar type, making them easy to grip and pull. The cabinet stands on four small feet, slightly elevating it from the ground, and the top surface is flat and broad enough to support additional items. The sides and back are plain, with a smooth, light wood finish and no visible hardware or openings. This piece is utilitarian yet visually appealing, suitable for organizing documents or small items in an urban environment.
description: A light wood vertical filing cabinet with three dark-fronted drawers and orange bar handles, standing on four small feet. The design is functional and visually striking, ideal for document storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three drawers with dark panels and orange bar handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, light wood side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless, smooth light wood back panel with no hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain side and the protruding handles of the drawers.
